name: RapiDoc

en.when_to_use: Use it instead of a hand-written implementation when you need to turn OpenAPI 3.x documentation into a searchable API reader with recursively expanded schemas and request examples in multiple languages, because native implementations fail at $ref resolution, deep-link navigation, and request-model expansion; not for an arbitrary Markdown documentation site or API gateway.
en.why_valuable: AI can only assemble static endpoint cards by default; it cannot consistently render cross-file $ref, recursive oneOf/allOf schemas, deep-link navigation, security schemes, and multi-language code examples.

data_in.note: spec is passed directly to <rapi-doc>'s public loadSpec(JSON object), not spec-url. The schema below covers only common OpenAPI fields; $ref is still resolved according to OpenAPI rules.

spec.paths: Record<string,Partial<Record<'get'|'post'|'put'|'patch'|'delete'|'head'|'options',{summary?:string (none by default),description?:string (none by default),operationId?:string (none by default),parameters?:object[] (default []),requestBody?:object (none by default),responses:Record<string,{description:string,content?:object}>}>>>

config?.show_header?: boolean -- default false in this entry
config?.allow_try?: boolean -- default false in this entry, preventing the documentation viewer from accidentally sending real API requests

spec.note: API documentation is long content; the outer container defaults to an explicit 640px height with internal component scrolling, and AI may override it with another pixel value. vh/percentage height is prohibited; set the height before mounting the custom element to prevent upstream from changing a zero-height parent to 100vh.

when_to_use: 需要把 OpenAPI 3.x 文档变成可搜索、递归展开 schema 并带多语言请求样例的 API 阅读器时用它而非手写,因为原生在 $ref 解析、深链导航和请求模型展开上失败;非做任意 Markdown 文档站或 API 网关。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能拼静态 endpoint 卡片,做不到跨文件 $ref、oneOf/allOf 递归 schema、深链导航、安全方案和多语言代码样例的一致渲染。

data_in.note: spec 直接传给 <rapi-doc> 的公开 loadSpec(JSON object),不是 spec-url。下面只裁剪 OpenAPI 高频字段；$ref 仍按 OpenAPI 规则解析。

spec.paths: Record<string,Partial<Record<'get'|'post'|'put'|'patch'|'delete'|'head'|'options',{summary?:string（默认无）,description?:string（默认无）,operationId?:string（默认无）,parameters?:object[]（默认 []）,requestBody?:object（默认无）,responses:Record<string,{description:string,content?:object}>}>>>

config?.allow_try?: boolean —— 本条默认 false,避免文档查看器意外发真实 API 请求

spec.note: API 文档是长内容,外层默认显式 640px 高并在组件内滚动,AI 可覆盖为其他像素值。禁用 vh/百分比高度；先设高度再挂 custom element,避免上游把零高父容器改成 100vh。

example._why: OpenAPI 是深 config 且 paths→method→responses 层级高歧义,minimal 给出 loadSpec 可直接接受的最小有效对象。

uplink: 默认是只读文档,无上行。若显式开启 Try 或要回传某 endpoint,由消费 AI 自己处理 RapiDoc 原生事件与载体边界；本条默认 allow_try=false 且不定义统一事件出口。

carriers.widget: conditional:custom element 自带 shadow DOM并经 createElement 挂入外层 shadowRoot;load-fonts=false 无字体 CDN,但含外部 $ref 的 spec 仍需网络/CORS
carriers.codex: supported:单 ESM custom element + 内建样式;含外部 $ref 时条件取决于 sandbox 网络与 CORS

isolation.evidence: STYLE=no(boot 配置下):唯一 document.head.appendChild 实测被 X 门控(X&&document.head,X=load-fonts 标志),boot 设 load-fonts=false 故不注入;LitElement 样式落自身 shadow(createRenderRoot x5、attachShadow)。若 load-fonts=true 则会注入字体 <link>。DOM=yes:实测 document.body.appendChild x3,为瞬时剪贴板(临时 <textarea>)与下载(<a>)辅助,复制/下载动作触发后自清,非常驻 portal。EVENTS=yes:实测 window.addEventListener 注册多监听 —— hashchange(深链导航)、keydown、keyup、storage、message、mousedown、mouseup、change;disconnect 时是否全清不确定。shadowCompatible=conditional:标准 shadow-DOM Web Component 可挂入外层 shadowRoot,但劫持 window hashchange 做深链、用 document.body 做剪贴板/下载、含外部 $ref 的 spec 需网络/CORS(与条目 widget=conditional 一致)。
